# International Employer of Record Registry

> The International Employer of Record Registry is the definitive international reference publication for the Employer of Record function — how a licensed local entity becomes the formal legal employer of a worker on behalf of a client business in a given jurisdiction. Each jurisdiction record is an editorial reference, not a marketing page: it documents legal employment structure, payroll administration, statutory tax and social-contribution compliance, applicable legislation, competent authorities, process flow, timelines, required documents, operating constraints and cross-border deployment relevance. Educate before converting; authority before SEO; editorial quality before commercial value.

Architecture: Home → Jurisdiction Index → Registry Object (one professional domain, one jurisdiction, per record). Records are added and updated continuously; each follows a stable 23-section structure so that jurisdictions can be compared like-for-like.

## Registry

- [International Employer of Record Registry](https://employer-of-record.org/): International Employer of Record Registry is a structured reference registry covering legal employment structures, payroll administration, statutory compliance and cross-border deployment across jurisdictions.
- [Jurisdictions](https://employer-of-record.org/jurisdictions): Jurisdictions represented in the International Employer of Record Registry. Each entry links to the corresponding jurisdiction record.

## Jurisdictions

- [Employer of Record in Sweden](https://employer-of-record.org/jurisdictions/sweden): Employer of Record in Sweden professional object registry covering legal employer structure, payroll administration, statutory social contributions, authorities, collective agreements and cross-border deployment relevance.
- [Employer of Record in Germany](https://employer-of-record.org/jurisdictions/germany): Employer of Record in Germany professional object registry covering legal employer structure, payroll administration, social insurance contributions via the Krankenkasse, dismissal protection, authorities and cross-border deployment relevance.
- [Employer of Record in Denmark](https://employer-of-record.org/jurisdictions/denmark): Employer of Record in Denmark professional object registry covering legal employer structure, payroll administration, statutory contributions, ATP pension, authorities, collective agreements and cross-border deployment relevance.
- [Employer of Record in Norway](https://employer-of-record.org/jurisdictions/norway): Employer of Record in Norway professional object registry covering legal employer structure, payroll administration, statutory contributions, arbeidsgiveravgift, authorities, permanent employment rules and cross-border deployment relevance.
- [Employer of Record in Finland](https://employer-of-record.org/jurisdictions/finland): Employer of Record in Finland professional object registry covering legal employer structure, payroll administration, TyEL pension contributions, Incomes Register reporting, authorities and cross-border deployment relevance.
- [Employer of Record in Netherlands](https://employer-of-record.org/jurisdictions/netherlands): Employer of Record in the Netherlands professional object registry covering legal employer structure, payroll administration, UWV dismissal permission, sector pension funds, authorities and cross-border deployment relevance.
- [Employer of Record in Belgium](https://employer-of-record.org/jurisdictions/belgium): Employer of Record in Belgium professional object registry covering legal employer structure, payroll administration, joint industry committee wage-setting, ONSS social security contributions, dual holiday-pay system, authorities and cross-border deployment relevance.
- [Employer of Record in France](https://employer-of-record.org/jurisdictions/france): Employer of Record in France professional object registry covering legal employer structure, payroll administration, SMIC and convention collective compliance, DSN reporting, authorities and cross-border deployment relevance.
- [Employer of Record in Spain](https://employer-of-record.org/jurisdictions/spain): Employer of Record in Spain professional object registry covering legal employer structure, payroll administration, Social Security contributions, Sistema RED reporting, authorities and cross-border deployment relevance.
- [Employer of Record in Italy](https://employer-of-record.org/jurisdictions/italy): Employer of Record in Italy professional object registry covering legal employer structure, payroll administration, INPS and INAIL contributions, CCNL collective bargaining, TFR severance, authorities and cross-border deployment relevance.
- [Employer of Record in the United Kingdom](https://employer-of-record.org/jurisdictions/united-kingdom): Employer of Record in the United Kingdom professional object registry covering legal employer structure, PAYE payroll administration, National Insurance contributions, sponsor licence limitations, authorities and cross-border deployment relevance.
- [Employer of Record in Ireland](https://employer-of-record.org/jurisdictions/ireland): Employer of Record in Ireland professional object registry covering legal employer structure, payroll administration, PRSI contributions, PAYE Modernisation reporting, authorities and cross-border deployment relevance.
- [Employer of Record in Poland](https://employer-of-record.org/jurisdictions/poland): Employer of Record in Poland professional object registry covering legal employer structure, payroll administration, ZUS social insurance contributions, PPK auto-enrolment, authorities and cross-border deployment relevance.
- [Employer of Record in Austria](https://employer-of-record.org/jurisdictions/austria): Employer of Record in Austria professional object registry covering legal employer structure, payroll administration, ÖGK social insurance contributions, Kollektivvertrag compliance, authorities and cross-border deployment relevance.
- [Employer of Record in Switzerland](https://employer-of-record.org/jurisdictions/switzerland): Employer of Record in Switzerland professional object registry covering legal employer structure, payroll administration, cantonal tax withholding, AHV/IV/EO and BVG contributions, authorities and cross-border deployment relevance.
- [Employer of Record in the Czech Republic](https://employer-of-record.org/jurisdictions/czech-republic): Employer of Record in the Czech Republic professional object registry covering legal employer structure, payroll administration, social security and health insurance contributions, the new JMHZ single monthly employer report, authorities and cross-border deployment relevance.
- [Employer of Record in Portugal](https://employer-of-record.org/jurisdictions/portugal): Employer of Record in Portugal professional object registry covering legal employer structure, payroll administration, mandatory 14-payment structure, social security contributions, authorities and cross-border deployment relevance.
- [Employer of Record in Hungary](https://employer-of-record.org/jurisdictions/hungary): Employer of Record in Hungary professional object registry covering legal employer structure, payroll administration, NAV single-collection tax and social contributions, employment supervision, authorities and cross-border deployment relevance.
- [Employer of Record in the United States](https://employer-of-record.org/jurisdictions/united-states): Employer of Record in the United States professional object registry covering the common law employer test, FLSA and FICA obligations, at-will employment, visa sponsorship limitations, authorities and cross-border deployment relevance.
- [Employer of Record in Canada](https://employer-of-record.org/jurisdictions/canada): Employer of Record in Canada professional object registry covering legal employer structure, payroll administration, CPP and EI contributions, provincial employment standards fragmentation, authorities and cross-border deployment relevance.

## Optional

- [llms-full.txt](https://employer-of-record.org/llms-full.txt): Full text content of every registry page (homepage, jurisdiction index, and all 20 jurisdiction records) in a single machine-readable document, for deep retrieval or offline indexing.
